subcodes.first_line: The All-Bountiful maketh mention of His servant, the Merciful, that the verses of his Lord may draw him unto that station wherein the atoms proclaim: "The Kingdom belongeth unto God!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الکریم یذکر عبده الرحیم لتجذبه آیات ربه الی مقام تنطق فیه الذرات الملک لله
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
